image:image.image:title: Der Fußabdruck der Gegenwart
image:image.image:caption: Nur wo du zu Fuß warst, bist du auch wirklich gewesen.

image:image.image:title: Caminhos do Infinito
image:image.image:caption: Há um caminho para o mar E um caminho para o sol E um caminho para o vento E um caminho para o nada.

image:image.image:title: De Chromatische Schakel
image:image.image:caption: Er is geen blauw zonder geel en zonder oranje, en als je blauw gebruikt, dan moet je ook geel en oranje gebruiken, nietwaar?

image:image.image:title: Limiar do Infinito
image:image.image:caption: Onde as nuvens encontram a terra, lá começa o céu.

image:image.image:title: Infinite Grains
image:image.image:caption: To see a World in a Grain of Sand And a Heaven in a Wild Flower, Hold Infinity in the palm of your hand And Eternity in an hour.

image:image.image:title: Éclat d'Automne
image:image.image:caption: L'automne est un deuxième printemps où chaque feuille est une fleur.

image:image.image:title: Corazón del Abismo
image:image.image:caption: En el mar, el pulpo... es la flor del abismo.

image:image.image:title: Stille Weisheit
image:image.image:caption: Berge sind stumme Lehrer und machen schweigsame Schüler.

image:image.image:title: Ver e Amar
image:image.image:caption: Olho para as coisas e não as penso. Que pensaria eu das coisas? Não as penso, vejo-as e amo-as.

image:image.image:title: Regard du Cœur
image:image.image:caption: On ne voit bien qu'avec le cœur. L'essentiel est invisible pour les yeux.

image:image.image:title: Sendas del Alma
image:image.image:caption: Caminante, son tus huellas el camino y nada más; Caminante, no hay camino, se hace camino al andar.

image:image.image:title: Espelho Dourado
image:image.image:caption: O mar é o espelho onde o sol se deita.

image:image.image:title: O Olhar do Sábio
image:image.image:caption: As coisas mais simples são as mais extraordinárias, e só os sábios conseguem vê-las.

image:image.image:title: Celestial Cutlery
image:image.image:caption: The Lightning is a yellow Fork From Tables in the Sky By inadvertent fingers dropt The awful Cutlery

image:image.image:title: Path of Freedom
image:image.image:caption: Afoot and light-hearted I take to the open road, Healthy, free, the world before me, The long brown path before me leading wherever I choose.

image:image.image:title: Lex Animi
image:image.image:caption: Quod non vetat lex, hoc vetat fieri pudor.

image:image.image:title: Das Absolute aus Stein und Meer
image:image.image:caption: Alles ist Stein, und alles ist Meer,

image:image.image:title: পাহাড়ের হৃদয়ে কুয়াশার চুম্বন
image:image.image:caption: কুয়াশা, প্রেমের মতো, পাহাড়ের হৃদয়ে খেলে আর প্রতিটি কুঁড়ি ও পাতায় সৌন্দর্যের চুম্বন এনে দেয়।

image:image.image:title: Sky Weaver's Promise
Nouveaux Yeux sur le Crépuscule
image:image.image:caption: Le véritable voyage de découverte ne consiste pas à chercher de nouveaux paysages, mais à avoir de nouveaux yeux.

image:image.image:title: Ocean's Unseen Serenity
image:image.image:caption: The true peace of God begins far away, out in the ocean, where there is no human eye to witness it.

image:image.image:title: Le trou dans l'espace
image:image.image:caption: Toute fenêtre est un trou dans l'espace qui fait rêver à un au-delà.

image:image.image:title: Entre Orillas y Estrellas
image:image.image:caption: El puente es un cuerpo que se extiende entre dos orillas, entre dos tiempos, entre dos soledades.

image:image.image:title: Le Roseau Pensant
image:image.image:caption: L'homme n'est qu'un roseau, le plus faible de la nature; mais c'est un roseau pensant.

image:image.image:title: A Espera dos Braços Longos
image:image.image:caption: Os guindastes do porto, braços longos No ar parado, esperam a carga.

image:image.image:title: Patina's Secret
image:image.image:caption: The stone is a word In a language I don't know.

image:image.image:title: Where Two Paths Diverge
image:image.image:caption: Two roads diverged in a yellow wood, And sorry I could not travel both And be one traveler, long I stood And looked down one as far as I could To where it bent in the undergrowth;

image:image.image:title: 夜明けの兆し
image:image.image:caption: 月は沈み、ほのぼのと夜明けの光が差し始めた。

image:image.image:title: The Visible Heart of Labor
image:image.image:caption: Work is love made visible.

image:image.image:title: Le Voile Transparent du Monde
image:image.image:caption: Le monde visible est un voile, non un mur.

image:image.image:title: Legado del Camino
image:image.image:caption: Lo que somos lo vamos dejando en el camino.

image:image.image:title: The Art of Absence
image:image.image:caption: Some cause happiness wherever they go; others, whenever they go.

image:image.image:title: El Llamado Silente del Sendero
image:image.image:caption: ¡Camino! Siempre me llamas, me abres, y me llevas sin fin, sin peso, sin descanso.

image:image.image:title: El hálito de lo ignoto
image:image.image:caption: Hay más allá de este aire un aire más puro, un cielo más claro, y la verdad que no se nombra.

image:image.image:title: El Alma Retorcida de la Vid
image:image.image:caption: ¡Oh la vid, que se retuerce, nudo, tronco, garra, cepa, con su alma de savia fuerte que en la tierra se alimenta y al sol y al aire se tuerce! ¡Oh la vid, que se retuerce!

image:image.image:title: Âme de Pierre, Main Éveillée
image:image.image:caption: La pierre n'a pas d'ombre, mais elle a un secret.

image:image.image:title: O Desvelar da Paisagem
image:image.image:caption: Há um instante em que a névoa se dissipa e a paisagem se revela, como uma verdade que se fez luz.

image:image.image:title: Entre o Quadro e o Além
image:image.image:caption: O mar é uma janela que se abre no fim do mundo.

image:image.image:title: 春の息吹
image:image.image:caption: 春の朝 世の初まりの 梅の花

image:image.image:title: L'Anima Intrecciata
image:image.image:caption: Impara a vedere. Renditi conto che tutto si connette a tutto il resto.

image:image.image:title: Die Sprache der Seele im Sturm
image:image.image:caption: Symbole sind die Sprache der Seele.

image:image.image:title: Unseen Strength Below
image:image.image:caption: Deep roots are not reached by the frost.

image:image.image:title: Where the Ocean Writes
image:image.image:caption: The edge of the sea is a strange and beautiful place. All life that exists there is poised for the great ebb and flow of the tides, and for the violence of the storms.

image:image.image:title: La Profondeur de la Surface
image:image.image:caption: Le plus profond, c'est la peau.

image:image.image:title: The Echo of a Touch
image:image.image:caption: We leave traces of ourselves wherever we go, on whatever we touch.

image:image.image:title: Passi Verso la Luce
image:image.image:caption: M'illumino d'immenso

image:image.image:title: How the Light Gets In
image:image.image:caption: There is a crack in everything, that's how the light gets in.

image:image.image:title: The Deep's Silent Oracle
image:image.image:caption: There is, one knows not what sweet mystery about this sea, whose gently awful stirrings seem to speak of some still grander agency at work than ordinary.

image:image.image:title: The Best-Laid Schemes
image:image.image:caption: The best-laid schemes o' Mice an' Men Gang aft agley,
